code:
sequenceDiagram %% Component Interaction - User browsing/searching journey %% Based on actual user flow through the application participant User as 👤 User participant Browser as 🌐 Browser participant NextJS as ⚛️ Next.js App participant ArtworkAPI as 🎨 Artwork API participant PersonAPI as 👥 Person API participant RAGAPI as 🧠 RAG API participant SolrClient as 🔍 Solr Client participant RAGService as 🔄 RAG Service participant ES as 🔍 Elasticsearch participant OpenAI as 🤖 OpenAI participant Mongo as 🍃 MongoDB Note over User, Mongo: User Journey: Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat %% 1. Homepage Load User->>Browser: Navigate to homepage Browser->>NextJS: GET /de (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) NextJS->>NextJS: Load homepage component NextJS-->>Browser: Homepage with hero section Browser-->>User: Display homepage %% 2. Search Artworks User->>Browser: Enter search query "impressionist" Browser->>NextJS: Search form submission NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&page=1&pageSize=12 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Build Solr query parameters SolrClient->>SolrClient: Execute search against collection.kunsthaus.ch SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: SolrSearchResponse with artworks + facets ArtworkAPI->>ArtworkAPI: Transform Solr results to Artwork models ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response with artworks + pagination NextJS->>NextJS: Update artwork grid component NextJS-->>Browser: Render search results Browser-->>User: Display 12 impressionist artworks %% 3. Filter Results User->>Browser: Apply category filter "Painting" Browser->>NextJS: Update search parameters NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&categories=Painting ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Add category filter to query SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Filtered results ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Filtered artworks NextJS-->>Browser: Updated results Browser-->>User: Show only paintings %% 4. View Artwork Detail User->>Browser: Click on artwork "Sunflowers" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/artworks/123 NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks/123 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: getArtworkById(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Artwork details ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Complete artwork data NextJS->>NextJS: Load artwork detail page + IIIF viewer NextJS-->>Browser: Artwork detail page Browser-->>User: Show artwork details + high-res image %% 5. View Related Artist User->>Browser: Click on artist "Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/persons/456 NextJS->>PersonAPI: GET /api/de/persons/456 PersonAPI->>SolrClient: getArtistById(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) SolrClient-->>PersonAPI: Person details PersonAPI-->>NextJS: Person data NextJS->>NextJS: Load person detail page NextJS-->>Browser: Person biography + artworks Browser-->>User: Show Van Gogh's biography + works %% 6. Ask RAG Question User->>Browser: Type question "What technique did Van Gogh use?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit RAG query NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}}) Note over RAGService: RAG Processing RAGService->>RAGService: Enhance query + detect language RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate embedding OpenAI-->>RAGService: Embedding vector par Vector Search RAGService->>ES: KNN search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Vector results and Lexical Search RAGService->>ES: BM25 search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Lexical results end RAGService->>RAGService: Merge results + select context RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context OpenAI-->>RAGService: Answer with citations RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult with citations RAGAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response NextJS->>NextJS: Update chat interface NextJS-->>Browser: Display answer with citations Browser-->>User: "Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik... [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]" %% 7. Follow-up Question User->>Browser: Ask follow-up "When was it painted?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit follow-up NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]}) RAGService->>RAGService: Process with conversation history RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context + history OpenAI-->>RAGService: Contextual answer RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Follow-up answer NextJS-->>Browser: Display contextual answer Browser-->>User: "Das Gemälde wurde 1888 gemalt... [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]" %% 8. Browse Related Artworks User->>Browser: Click "View all works by Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to artist's works NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?person=456&page=1 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: All Van Gogh artworks ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Artwork list NextJS-->>Browser: Grid of Van Gogh's works Browser-->>User: Show all Van Gogh artworks %% Error Handling alt Search Error SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Error response ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: 500 Error NextJS-->>Browser: Error message Browser-->>User: "Search temporarily unavailable" end alt RAG Error RAGService-->>RAGAPI: No context found RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Empty response NextJS-->>Browser: "No information available" Browser-->>User: "Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen." end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为美术馆的数字化平台绘制一个完整的用户旅程时序图，覆盖从搜索浏览到智能问答的全流程。重点要体现RAG系统如何与艺术品数据交互。
明白了。我先确认一下参与者的划分：前端层面有用户和浏览器，应用层是Next.js，然后API层需要拆分为艺术品API、人物API和RAG API三个独立服务，对吗？
对的，而且RAG后端还需要区分RAGService业务层和具体的向量检索、大模型调用。另外搜索部分用Solr，向量检索用Elasticsearch，数据库用MongoDB。
好的，我已经画出了基础参与者结构，从用户到MongoDB的全链路。现在我来补充首页加载的流程：用户导航到首页，浏览器向Next.js请求德语页面，然后返回带英雄区块的首页。
接下来是核心的艺术品搜索场景。用户输入"印象派"关键词，这个请求要经过艺术品API转到SolrClient，注意这里Solr查询需要带分页参数，每页12件作品。
已添加搜索流程，包括Solr构建查询参数、执行collection.kunsthaus.ch搜索，返回带分面的结果，再转换为艺术品模型返回给前端。用户最终看到12件印象派作品。
还需要展示筛选交互。用户在结果页勾选"绘画"分类，这个过滤器要追加到Solr查询里，重新搜索后只返回绘画类的印象派作品。
筛选流程已补充。现在进入详情页场景——用户点击《向日葵》这幅画，Next.js导航到作品详情路由，通过Solr获取完整数据，同时加载IIIF viewer展示高分辨率图像。
很好，然后要有艺术家关联跳转。用户在详情页点击"梵高"，这时要切换到PersonAPI查询人物数据，展示传记和其他作品。注意这里要用到IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode查询。
艺术家详情流程已添加。现在到了最关键的RAG问答环节——用户在作品页输入问题"梵高使用了什么技法？"，这个请求要携带作品ID作为上下文。
RAG处理要详细一些：RAGService先增强查询并检测语言，然后调用OpenAI生成embedding，接着并行执行向量搜索和BM25词法搜索，合并结果后再生成带引用的答案。
已用par/end块画出并行的KNN向量搜索和BM25词法搜索，都从Elasticsearch获取结果。最终答案要显示引用来源，比如"梵高使用了油画技法...[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]"。
还需要支持追问。用户接着问"这幅画是什么时候创作的？"，RAGService要利用对话历史来生成上下文相关的回答，而不是孤立处理。
追问流程已补充，标注了Process with conversation history。最后还有浏览关联作品——用户点击"查看梵高全部作品"，回到ArtworkAPI按人物ID搜索。
别忘了错误处理。搜索服务异常时要返回友好的错误提示，RAG如果找不到上下文也要给出"暂无相关信息"的兜底响应。
已添加两个alt块：搜索错误时显示"Search temporarily unavailable"，RAG无上下文时显示德语"Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen."。整个旅程从Search到Browse到Detail到Related到Chat的完整闭环就完成了。
检查一下，所有的IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic、IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode和IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker标记都正确对应到相应的查询节点了吗？这些标记对后续的系统对接很重要。
已全部核对：首页加载、作品详情、追问关联和艺术家全部作品查询用了IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic；搜索和艺术家详情用了IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode；筛选和追问用了IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。时序图完整反映了用户旅程的所有技术交互。
